ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clinics" (
  "clinic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinic */,
  "clinic_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinic */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the clinic */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the clinic */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the clinic */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the clinic's website */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the clinic was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clinic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinicians" (
  "clinician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinician */,
  "clinician_name" TEXT /* Full name of the clinician */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the clinician (e.g., pediatrics, cardiology) */,
  "clinic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinic the clinician works at */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the clinician */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education obtained by the clinician */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the clinician has been practicing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clinician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinicians_clinic_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinic_id") REFERENCES clinics ("clinic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Medical condition of the patient (e.g., asthma) */,
  "clinic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinic the patient is being treated at */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_id" TEXT /* Insurance ID number */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of patient's allergies */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Text field for additional medical history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_clinic_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinic_id") REFERENCES clinics ("clinic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "severity_levels" TEXT /* Possible severity levels of the condition (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "treatment_options" TEXT /* Text field for listing treatment options for the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the treatment (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "recommended_dose" TEXT /* Recommended dose for the treatment */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Text field for listing potential side effects */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the plan belongs to */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment being administered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment plan */,
  "clinician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinician who created the treatment plan */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the treatment plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment plan (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_clinician_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinician_id") REFERENCES clinicians ("clinician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient outcome */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the outcome belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome */,
  "chest_indrawing_count" INTEGER /* Chest indrawing count */,
  "grant_count" INTEGER /* Grant count */,
  "bronchodilator_count" INTEGER /* Bronchodilator count */,
  "stridor_count" INTEGER /* Stridor count */,
  "nasal_count" INTEGER /* Nasal count */,
  "eczema_count" INTEGER /* Eczema count */,
  "rr_counter_count" INTEGER /* RR counter count */,
  "learn_opening_count" INTEGER /* Learn opening count */,
  "app_opening_count" INTEGER /* App opening count */,
  "symptom_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of symptoms (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "treatment_effectiveness" INTEGER /* Rating of treatment effectiveness (e.g., 1-5 scale) */,
  "clinician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinician who recorded the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_outcomes_clinician_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinician_id") REFERENCES clinicians ("clinician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment being administered */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the treatment belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the treatment was administered */,
  "dose" REAL /* Dose of the treatment */,
  "clinician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinician who administered the treatment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the treatment administration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id", "patient_id", "date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_treatments_clinician_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinician_id") REFERENCES clinicians ("clinician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the engagement belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., appointment, phone call) */,
  "clinician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinician involved in the engagement */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_engagement_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_engagement_clinician_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinician_id") REFERENCES clinicians ("clinician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., patient, clinician, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_conditions" (
  "patient_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-condition relationship */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "clinician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinician who made the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_conditions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_conditions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_conditions_clinician_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinician_id") REFERENCES clinicians ("clinician_id")
)
